failed_jobs.name: TensorFlow Layer Tests / TensorFlow Layer Tests

summary: Single TF2 Keras LSTM accuracy test failed on CPU due to numerical mismatch. The test uses LSTM with dropout=(0.1, 0.3) and relu activation which is non-deterministic. Max diff was 0.119 (threshold 1e-4). PR #36518 is an NPU VM runtime library rename and is unrelated to CPU LSTM computation.
root_cause: Flaky test - LSTM with dropout produces non-deterministic outputs; numerical precision exceeds 1e-4 threshold intermittently
